keyword.title: Target Keyword
keyword.description: The search keyword to rank check. E.g. 'Dental clinic', 'dentist near me'.

placeId.title: Place ID (recommended)
placeId.description: Google Place ID of the target business (ChIJ... or hex-pair format). Provide this OR businessName. Place ID is more accurate.

businessName.title: Business Name (if no Place ID)
businessName.description: Full business name. If placeId is not provided, the actor will auto-resolve it from this name on the first run.

centerLat.title: Center Latitude
centerLat.description: Latitude of the grid center (business location). E.g. 17.3850 for Hyderabad.

centerLng.title: Center Longitude
centerLng.description: Longitude of the grid center (business location). E.g. 78.4867 for Hyderabad.

gridSize.title: Grid Size (3, 5, 7, or 9)
gridSize.description: Creates an N×N grid of rank-check points. Enter 3 (9 pts hyper-local), 5 (25 pts neighbourhood), 7 (49 pts standard), or 9 (81 pts metro-wide).

gridSpacingMeters.title: Grid Spacing in meters
gridSpacingMeters.description: Distance between adjacent grid points in metres. Enter 300 (dense city), 500 (standard/optimal), 1000 (suburb), or 2000 (rural).

maxRankToShow.title: Max Rank to Track
maxRankToShow.description: If the business is ranked beyond this position at a grid point, record it as 'not ranked'. Default 20.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy Configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Residential proxies are mandatory — Google blocks datacenter IPs.
